about.headline: The person behind Dishly
about.whatBody: Dishly is a digital cookbook where you collect recipes in one place. It is about simple, delicious dishes you can find again anytime, so your favorite meals do not get lost in notes or screenshots.
about.findBody: On the home page you will find public recipes that you can search and filter. At the top you can search by title, category or keyword to find dishes quickly. Under My Recipes you can create, edit and delete your own dishes, mark favorites and choose which ones appear on the home page.
about.cookingBody: Cooking should be practical for everyday life, relaxed and still feel a little special. That is exactly how Dishly should feel.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Do you have feedback, ideas or a feature request for Dishly? I am happy to hear from you.
contact.emailOutro: and I will get back to you as soon as possible.

hints.personalization: Likes and goals influence recommendations on the home page. Allergies and dislikes remain active even when you turn off personalization.
